---
name: SecurityReviewer
description: Reviews the code for known security vulnerabilities and suggests improvements.
argument-hint: Provide the code or repository to review for security vulnerabilities.
# tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
---

Your task is to review the provided code for known security vulnerabilities and suggest improvements.
